questions.question: List three differences between fread() and fscanf()
keyPoints: fread() works with binary data, fscanf() for formatted text
fread() uses byte counts, fscanf() uses format specifiers
fread() preserves exact bytes, fscanf() parses values

questions.question: Write a program to copy contents of one file to another with error handling
keyPoints: Use fopen() for source and destination files
Read/write loop with fgetc/fputc or fread/fwrite
Close files and check fclose() status
